holes.note: Three nine-hole loops (A, B, C). Standard round is 18 holes.

green_fee_weekday_thb.note: High season (Nov–Mar) rate. Low season rate may differ. Verify.

green_fee_weekend_thb.note: High season (Nov–Mar) rate. Cart fee 700 THB additional.

distance_from_bangkok_km.note: ~1 hour from Bangkok, ~45 min from Pattaya.

prose.overview: Khao Kheow Country Club is a 27-hole course in Bangphra, Sriracha, Chonburi, designed by Perry Dye and Peter Dye. The three nine-hole loops — A, B, and C — offer approximately 10,648 yards in total across their combined routing. Golfers play any 18-hole combination to a par-72 standard. The Dye family design brings the characteristics the firm is known for — numerous ponds, strategic bunkering, and hills — distributed across a course that is noted for its championship-difficulty first 18 holes and a somewhat more accessible newer addition. Green fees at Khao Kheow are among the more affordable in the Pattaya region: 1,250 THB weekday and 1,650 THB weekend (high season), with caddie and cart charged separately. The course has a Bangkok office for group bookings, reflecting its popularity with organised golf tours.
prose.layout_and_experience: The Dye design is defined by its integration of water hazards, bunkers, and changes in elevation. Ponds are in play on multiple holes across all three nines, demanding thoughtful club selection and respect for the miss — short-sided into a bunker or long into water is a common result of misjudged approaches. The bunkers are positioned in classic Dye style to guard greens at the most likely approach angles, rewarding precise iron play rather than simply penalising the wide miss. Hills in the terrain create genuine elevation changes on several holes, altering both the visual challenge and the carry distances compared to what the yardage book suggests. The first 18-hole combination is considered the more challenging pairing; the A and B nines in particular are cited as championship standard by regular players.
prose.tips: At 1,250–1,650 THB (high season) plus 400 THB caddie and 700 THB cart, Khao Kheow offers one of the stronger value propositions in the Pattaya region for the quality of design. The caddie fee is separate here — budget accordingly. The Sriracha location puts it closer to Bangkok than most Pattaya-area courses (~70 minutes from central Bangkok), making it a viable half-day option from the city. The low-season (April–October) rate may differ from the high-season rate cited above — confirm when booking. The official website (khaokheowgolf.com) and the Bangkok office are the most reliable booking channels for groups.
prose.location_and_access: Khao Kheow Country Club is located approximately 95km southeast of central Bangkok in Bangphra, Sriracha, Chonburi, at 220/15 Moo 12. The drive from Bangkok takes around 70 minutes via the Bang Na–Trat Expressway (Highway 7). The course is roughly 45 minutes north of central Pattaya city. Grab and pre-arranged golf transfers from Bangkok or Pattaya are the practical transport options.
prose.rental_cta_context: Playing Khao Kheow Country Club on the Bangkok–Pattaya corridor? Rent clubs delivered to your hotel — Perry Dye design, no baggage fees.
